excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Physics lists Main application period opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-05-15. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 15 May 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.
